justification: The AI 2027 'About' page explicitly lists Daniel Kokotajlo, Scott Alexander, Thomas Larsen, Eli Lifland, and Romeo Dean as co-authors of the scenario.
The AI 2027 'About' page explicitly lists Daniel Kokotajlo and Thomas Larsen together as co-authors of the scenario.
The AI 2027 'About' page explicitly lists Daniel Kokotajlo and Eli Lifland together as co-authors of the scenario.
The AI 2027 'About' page explicitly lists Daniel Kokotajlo and Romeo Dean together as co-authors of the scenario.
DAIR Institute's own blog post on Miceli's TIME100 AI recognition names her as DAIR research lead and Timnit Gebru as DAIR founder, documenting the collaboration.
Senator Warner's official press release explicitly names both Warner and Rounds as co-introducers of the Economy of the Future Commission Act.
Senator Heinrich's official press release explicitly names Heinrich and Rounds as co-sponsors of the Unleashing AI Innovation in Financial Services Act.
Muck Rack journalist profile for Dan Kagan-Kans lists The Wall Street Journal as one of his publication outlets, documenting his writing relationship with the WSJ.
The American Scholar's author page for Dan Kagan-Kans confirms his byline and published articles at the publication.
Senator Coons's official press release names both Coons and Cotton as co-introducers of the AI dominance resolution.
Senator Coons's official press release names both Coons and McCormick as co-introducers of the Liquid Cooling for AI Act.
Senator Coons's official press release on the AI dominance resolution names Amy Klobuchar as a co-sponsor alongside Coons.
Senator Coons's official press release on the AI dominance resolution names Roger Wicker as a co-sponsor alongside Coons.
Senator Coons's official press release on the AI dominance resolution names Jeanne Shaheen as a co-sponsor alongside Coons.
Senator Heinrich's Senate AI Caucus page documents his co-chair role alongside Mike Rounds in the Senate Artificial Intelligence Caucus.
